publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-04-29 18:15:35 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Collection contains grant files, publications, subject files, photographs.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Robin Bellinder papers, #21-41-4284. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Professor of Horticulture and expert in weed control in vegetable crops.

did.unittitle: P. minor weed seed sample data
Data for "Improving herbicide application accuracy in South Asia"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Maps, negatives, photos, overheads and a powerpoint presentation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes - A Review of the Science…in Tap Water Blues: Herbicides in Drinking Water

did.unittitle: Assessment of agricultural research in Afghanistan

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photograph scrapbook documenting the field experience students from the International Agriculture and Rural Development course had in India.

did.unittitle: South America sabbatic notes and photos
Histology photos as sent to journal
Publications not listed in curricula vitae
